ch100_s7000.oracle_state: oracle initialized isolated evaluation; synthetic previous oranges on plate; robot joints set from subtask dataset frame 0 when applicable
ch100_s7000.interpretation: B2/B3 measure sub-policy ability under idealized prefix conditions; they are not estimates of real sequential rollout performance
